notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, pitcher Noah Schultz to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
